CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s Motion For Leave To File An Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court does not "deem" amended pleadings filed and served. Plaintiff must file and serve the amended pleading after the motion is granted. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
